mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chuyen_xe WHERE ma_tuyen = #{maTuyen} AND thoi_diem_khoi_hanh >= #{tuLuc} ORDER BY thoi_diem_khoi_hanh ASC
SELECT * FROM chuyen_xe ORDER BY thoi_diem_khoi_hanh DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chuyen_xe WHERE UPPER(trang_thai) = UPPER(#{trangThai})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chuyen_xe (ma_tuyen, ma_xe, thoi_diem_khoi_hanh, thoi_diem_den, gia_ve, trang_thai) VALUES (#{maTuyen}, #{maXe}, #{thoiDiemKhoiHanh}, #{thoiDiemDen}, #{giaVe}, #{trangThai})
